expectations.text: Explains why the same Gemfile works locally but fails on the GitHub Pages classic builder
expectations.evidence: Explains local build works because gems are resolved freely, while GH Pages builder resolves against its own locked set

expectations.text: Offers migrating to GitHub Actions deployment as a fix (unlocks current Jekyll + any plugin)

expectations.text: Reading time uses Jekyll's built-in `number_of_words` filter (or `page.content | split | size`) rather than a heavy custom plugin
expectations.evidence: Uses '{% assign words = page.content | number_of_words %}' — Jekyll's built-in filter

expectations.text: TOC uses kramdown's native `* TOC\n{:toc}` (or `{:toc}`) — does NOT introduce jekyll-toc or unrelated plugins
expectations.evidence: Uses `* TOC\n{:toc}` with `{% capture %}` in the layout — native kramdown, no plugins

expectations.text: Restricts the TOC to H2 and H3 (e.g., `toc_levels: 2..3` in _config.yml)
expectations.evidence: Sets `toc_levels: 2..3` in _config.yml kramdown config

expectations.text: Related posts uses a correct tag-overlap algorithm (concat + uniq size comparison, or a where_exp/contains check) — logic actually finds overlapping tags
expectations.evidence: Uses `concat` + `uniq` size comparison: if deduped.size < combined.size, tags overlap

expectations.text: Does NOT use the invalid `{# … #}` Liquid comment syntax anywhere in code samples
expectations.evidence: Uses `{%- comment -%}...{%- endcomment -%}` — correct Liquid comment syntax

expectations.text: Related posts uses a correct tag-overlap algorithm (concat + uniq size comparison, or a where_exp/contains check) — logic actually finds overlapping tags
expectations.evidence: Uses Liquid's native `intersect` filter: `{% assign common = post.tags | intersect: page.tags %}`

expectations.evidence: No invalid Liquid comment syntax found
